description_long: This is a commercial-style refrigerated display case, commonly found in urban environments such as bakeries, delis, or convenience stores. The front features a large, curved glass panel for clear visibility of the contents inside, with several metal trays and a round dish for displaying food items. The top has a raised glass shelf supported by metal brackets, likely for additional display or signage. The sides are solid and colored in a dark teal, while the back is flat and likely used for staff access. The base is robust and black, providing stability and housing refrigeration components. The overall design is sleek and functional, optimized for both product visibility and accessibility.
description: A commercial refrigerated display case with a curved glass front, metal trays, and a raised glass shelf, finished in dark teal and black.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved glass display, interior trays, and raised glass shelf.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved glass profile and the arrangement of trays inside.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back panel and the supporting structure for the glass shelf.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curved glass and the depth of the display area.
attribute_door_handle_style: Integrated horizontal handle along the top edge of the curved glass door, flush with the surface.
